statement.en: “Mondialisation capillaire“ de la littérature tchèque contemporaine: entre globalisation et exoticisation

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Document is marked 'inPress' (2026 future date, provisional publication status). The concept of 'capillary mondialisation' of contemporary Czech literature is a theoretical framework under active development, combining globalization studies with literary criticism. Status is explicitly pre-validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 小さな毛細血管を通じて、局所的なものが世界中に浸透する不思議。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 中心から毛細血管のように広がる言語の痕跡が、異なる色で世界に根付く。
